title: Replace raw score addition with RRF-based fusion
requirements: Keep raw backend score as diagnostic metadata.
Store per-channel rank and RRF score during candidate merge.
Compute final score from profile weights, RRF scores, overlap boost, authority boost and penalties.
Support source_data vector candidates only for explicit source retrieval paths.
Expose ranking_profile, normalization, weights and per-channel score details in trace.
Preserve current trust, scope and sensitivity gates.
